The '''Sd-77 sonic pistol''' was a ranged weapon produced by [[Pacnorval Defense Systems, Limited]]. The [[sonic pistol]] fired a wide blast of high-intensity sound waves which could shatter solid objects or stun a [[Sentience/Legends|sentient]].

The Sd-77 was popular among private security firms including [[Santhe Security]]. Pacnorval also produced a larger, rifle variant; the [[Sg-82 sonic rifle]].<ref name="EGWT" />
